revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:State establishment category/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:State establishment category/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:State establishment category/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:State establishment category/doc]]</includeonly>

#redirect[[:en:Template:State establishment category/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:State establishment category/doc]]</includeonly>

{{Documentation subpage}} This template is used to generate standardized text, navigation, and parent categories for * Category:States and territories established in YYYY * Category:States and territories established in YYYY BC * Category:States and territories disestablished in YYYY * Category:States and territories disestablished in YYYY BC It automatically adds the following parent categories * Category:YYYY (dis)establishments * Category:States and territories by year of (dis)establishment * Category:States and territories (dis)established in the YYY0s * Category:YYYY in politics – for year 1500 onwards * Category:YYYY in international relations == Usage == * {{state est cat|YYYY}} for the year YYYY * {{state est cat|YYYY|BC}} for the year YYYY BC The template automatically determines if it is being used in an established or disestablished category by checking the name of the transcluding page. {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Establishments-by-year templates]] [[Category:Disestablishments-by-year templates]] [[ar:قالب:تصنيف دول تأسست]] [[ur:سانچہ:زمرہ آزادی ممالک]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} This template is used to generate standardized text, navigation, and parent categories for * Category:States and territories established in YYYY * Category:States and territories established in YYYY BC * Category:States and territories disestablished in YYYY * Category:States and territories disestablished in YYYY BC It automatically adds the following parent categories * Category:YYYY (dis)establishments * Category:States and territories by year of (dis)establishment * Category:States and territories (dis)established in the YYY0s * Category:YYYY in politics – for year 1500 onwards * Category:YYYY in international relations == Usage == * {{state est cat|YYYY}} for the year YYYY * {{state est cat|YYYY|BC}} for the year YYYY BC The template automatically determines if it is being used in an established or disestablished category by checking the name of the transcluding page. {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Establishments-by-year templates]] [[Category:Disestablishments-by-year templates]] [[ar:قالب:تصنيف دول تأسست]] [[ur:سانچہ:زمرہ آزادی ممالک]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} This template is used to generate standardized text, navigation, and parent categories for * Category:States and territories established in YYYY * Category:States and territories established in YYYY BC * Category:States and territories disestablished in YYYY * Category:States and territories disestablished in YYYY BC It automatically adds the following parent categories * Category:YYYY (dis)establishments * Category:States and territories by year of (dis)establishment * Category:States and territories (dis)established in the YYY0s * Category:YYYY in politics – for year 1500 onwards * Category:YYYY in international relations == Usage == * {{state est cat|YYYY}} for the year YYYY * {{state est cat|YYYY|BC}} for the year YYYY BC The template automatically determines if it is being used in an established or disestablished category by checking the name of the transcluding page. {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Establishments-by-year templates]] [[Category:Disestablishments-by-year templates]] [[ar:قالب:تصنيف دول تأسست]] [[ur:سانچہ:زمرہ آزادی ممالک]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23606946259|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} This template is used to generate standardized text, navigation, and parent categories for * Category:States and territories established in YYYY * Category:States and territories established in YYYY BC * Category:States and territories disestablished in YYYY * Category:States and territories disestablished in YYYY BC It automatically adds the following parent categories * Category:YYYY (dis)establishments * Category:States and territories by year of (dis)establishment * Category:States and territories (dis)established in the YYY0s * Category:YYYY in politics – for year 1500 onwards * Category:YYYY in international relations == Usage == * {{state est cat|YYYY}} for the year YYYY * {{state est cat|YYYY|BC}} for the year YYYY BC The template automatically determines if it is being used in an established or disestablished category by checking the name of the transcluding page. {{Sandbox other|| [[ar:قالب:تصنيف دول تأسست]] [[ur:سانچہ:زمرہ آزادی ممالک]] }} [[Category:Establishments-by-year templates]] [[Category:Disestablishments-by-year templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments; consolidate 2 interlanguage link(s) into wikidata link template [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24975162458|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} This template is used to generate standardized text, navigation, and parent categories for * Category:States and territories established in YYYY * Category:States and territories established in YYYY BC * Category:States and territories disestablished in YYYY * Category:States and territories disestablished in YYYY BC It automatically adds the following parent categories * Category:YYYY (dis)establishments * Category:States and territories by year of (dis)establishment * Category:States and territories (dis)established in the YYY0s * Category:YYYY in politics – for year 1500 onwards * Category:YYYY in international relations == Usage == * {{state est cat|YYYY}} for the year YYYY * {{state est cat|YYYY|BC}} for the year YYYY BC The template automatically determines if it is being used in an established or disestablished category by checking the name of the transcluding page. {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Establishments-by-year templates]] [[Category:Disestablishments-by-year templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] {{wikidata link||ar|قالب:تصنيف دول تأسست|ur|سانچہ:زمرہ آزادی ممالک}}
